# Process Reliabilism

**Node Type:** synthesis
**Node ID:** 9d7d3509-917f-490a-ba55-bd0529c37ff3
**Depth:** 5
**Terminal:** No

**Parent:** [What about cases of cognitive malfunction?](what-about-cases-of-cognitive-malfunction-antithesis-fd06af75-3040-4157-85ba-b185e871651d.md)

## Content

**Knowledge is true belief generated by a generally reliable cognitive process**, **A cognitive process is reliable if it reliably yields true beliefs**, **A person knows a proposition if their belief is the result of a reliable process**, **For a person to know a proposition, it is necessary that the proposition is true**
